posts.text: Congrats to Vanderbilt on their first tourney win in 14 years. Didn’t think they played very well though. Game against Nebraska — who just won their first tourney game ever — should be a good one on Saturday. I’ve got the Commodores to the Sweet 16.
High Point! Upsets are back already after a year of complete chalk.

Not paying TSA agents is indefensible. Every congressman and senator and their staffs should also go unpaid if they shut down pay for workers like this.


The Clay Travis & Buck Sexton Show (@clayandbuck)

.@ClayTravis: "Why should TSA agents' paychecks be held hostage because Democrats are angry about ICE?"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/clayandbuck/status/2034702342096912777#m
4.3 seconds left and a half court heave as the shot is an epic fail.
TCU gets the win. Awful play design from Ohio State.
Congrats to long suffering Nebraska basketball fans on their first ever NCAA tourney win.

Trump was also not alive yet on Pearl Harbor Day, Jake. This was a joke about the importance of keeping surprises in war. As everyone with a functional brain recognized.


Jake Tapper 🦅 (@jaketapper)

FWIW Prime Minister Takaichi was born 20 years after Pearl Harbor



— https://nitter.net/jaketapper/status/2034674663700213850#m
I have said this is the year for the past four decades.
Billion dollar bracket here. At some point in my life Tennessee will make a final four. This is the year!

This is a super cool idea.


Sadie (@Sadie_NC)

Not sure if this is a thing everywhere, but seniors give their jerseys to the teachers who had the greatest impact on their lives. Thank you to the teachers who really make a difference in these kids' lives.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Sadie_NC/status/2034083232946270354#m

A 20 year old University of Alabama student, James Gracey, is missing in Barcelona. There are lots of American college kids in Spain who may know something. Please help if you can. Details below from @LawrenceBJones3:

Video
Good morning, March Madness is here! Shout out to all the teachers putting the games on for the kids today, you’re all heroes.

Mayor Mamdani’s wife has been cheering the murder of Jews for a decade online. It’s what she believes and she should have to answer for it herself. I discussed with @seanhannity:

Video

Miami of Ohio college kids break out the speedos to distract an SMU free throw shooter. And he missed the first one badly. Well done:

Video
We hit the streets of Nashville to test SEC fans' geography knowledge
USA Baseball Repping USA Hockey!
Clay Travis is LOVING his new Tesla!
Auburn or Miami (OH)... Who Deserves To Make The Tournament
